app.name: Unlimited Events Expansion
birthday.dialog.title: It is your birthday today. Want to celebrate it?
event-time-menu.too-late: Too late to schedule this event today.
event-location-menu.title: Select one location.
event-npc-menu.required-error: {{name}} is required and cannot be removed.
event-npc-menu.no-slots: This location has no open attendee slots.
event-npc-menu.slots-limit: You can add up to {{optionalLimit}} optional NPC(s).
event-npc-menu.main-npcs-required: Main and required NPCs must remain selected.
hud.no-valid-location: No valid location is available for this event.
notification.bad-weather: Cannot schedule outdoor events in this weather.
notification.daily-limit: You can only schedule {{limit}} events per day without your own API key. Check out the mod page for more instructions!
notification.new-version: === UnlimitedEventExpansion ===^^Newer version is available. Your current version may be outdated and no longer working.
notification.check-usage-failed: === Unlimited Event Expansion ===^^Failed to check AI usage for 3 times in a row, AI usage is temporarily disabled.^^Please check mod page for support. HaPyke!
notification.usage-limit-reached: === Unlimited Event Expansion ===^^Total AI usage reached its limit and is temporarily disabled.^^This will be reset the next day in timezone UTC+0. HaPyke!
config.language.name: Language
config.language.tooltip: Language used for generated dialogue. Use English for default behavior.
config.theme.name: NPC Profile Theme
config.theme.tooltip:
Choose the theme folder inside 'npc_profile' to load NPC characteristics from.
Require exit to title screen and reload to take effect.
config.ai-config.desc: All options below require your own API key to be effective. You still can use the mod but will have a limited usage. Return to title screen to see the options.
config.key.name: Key
config.key.tooltip:
OpenAI or Gemini key. See mod page for instructions how to get one.
OpenAI keys: https://platform.openai.com/account/api-keys
Gemini keys: https://aistudio.google.com/apikey
config.model.name: Model
config.model.tooltip:
Choose which model to use.
Of course if you using OpenAI key, choose one of the OpenAI models; and vice versa for Gemini key.
config.section.pacing: These options control event quality and pacing.
config.allow-early-event.name: Ignore heart-level requirements
config.allow-early-event.tooltip:
If enabled, you have access to events without the usual heart-level limits.
Restart the game after changing this option.
config.event-length.name: Event length
config.characteristic-mode.name: NPC detail level
config.characteristic-mode.tooltip:
Higher detail gives richer NPC personality at higher token cost.
Compared to Standard: Minimal uses about 100 fewer tokens, Detailed uses about 100 extra tokens per NPC.
